summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json to register REQ-1 as a pending feature request. No actual frontend implementation has been made — the PayrollSummary component has not been rendered on the WageCalculator page, no loading skeletons have been added, and no layout/responsiveness changes have been implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Make the PayrollSummary component visible on the WageCalculator page, rendered directly below the WageEntryTable, so that the summary values (Steuer-Brutto, SV-Brutto, Nettoentgelt, Auszahlung) are always visible without any additional user action.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff contains only a change to project_state.json marking the feature as 'pending'. No frontend code changes were made to render PayrollSummary below WageEntryTable, display the four values, show loading skeletons, or ensure responsive layout.
